name: Autologous mitochondrial transplant for acute cerebral ischemia: Phase 1 trial results and review
short_name: Acute cerebral ischemia autologous mitochondrial transplant phase 1
summary: A phase 1 report of autologous mitochondrial transplantation during mechanical thrombectomy for acute ischemic stroke, with primary emphasis on acute feasibility and safety.
venue: Journal of Cerebral Blood Flow and Metabolism
